name: Project ARMC-88 Vortex Crystallizer Industrial Bill of Materials

structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.specification: Particle Size: 15-45 microns, Vacuum Induction Melted, ASTM F3055 Standard
structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.purpose: Primary metal substrate for Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS) of the high-strength ARMC-03 outer retaining containment rings

structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.item: Implant-Grade Titanium Alloy Powder (Ti6Al4V ELI Grade 23)
structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.specification: Extra Low Interstitial, Gas Atomized Spherical Powder, ASTM F136 Standard
structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.purpose: Raw core substrate for DMLS printing the complex internal cardioid channels of the ARMC-01 Injector Header

structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.specification: High-Density Sintered Blank Sleeve, Solid Cylinder, Outer Diameter: 18.0mm, Inner Diameter: 4.5mm to 1.2mm Tapered
structural_housing_and_extreme_pressure_.purpose: Provides the ultra-hard, non-conductive internal throat shield matrix to entirely eliminate micro-pitting fatigue from cavitation

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.specification: P-type and N-type Semiconductor Pairs, Doped for High-Temperature Differential Performance up to 400C
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.purpose: Populates the concentric outer shell of the ARMC-02 acceleration throat to drive Seebeck power regeneration

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, High-Temperature Metallized Aluminum Contacts
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.purpose: Constructs the secondary acoustic-to-electrical regenerative dampening loops behind the cBN inner core liners

thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.specification: 99.99% Pure Oxygen-Free Electronic (OFE) Copper, Thickness: 0.25mm, Dead-Soft Temper
thermodynamic_and_closed_loop_recycling_.purpose: Forms the positive and negative bus-bar collectors for harvesting Seebeck current from the throat jacket

high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.specification: Silver-Plated, Hollow-Core Self-Energizing Profile, Outer Diameter: 24.0mm, Section Thickness: 1.6mm
high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.purpose: Establishes a permanent gas-tight metallic compression seal at the inter-module high-pressure flange splits

high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.specification: Durometer Hardness: 80A, Temperature Range: -60C to 200C, High-Chemical Resistance to Supercritical CO2
high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.purpose: Provides secondary backup sealing bounds inside the outer coaxial thermal-siphon pre-heater jacket sleeves

high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.specification: High-Temperature Electrically Conductive Paste, Operating Range up to 800C, Structural Grade
high_pressure_hydraulic_seals_and_gasket.purpose: Fills interface tracking margins between the Inconel casing and the PVDF piezo acoustic rings to damp mechanical noise
